words.meaning_en: A small medical place where a doctor sees patients

words.meaning_en: The protection of nature, animals, and natural resources

words.meaning_en: A small amount of food eaten between main meals

words.meaning_en: Instructions that tell you how to cook a dish

words.meaning_en: The feeling of wanting or needing food

words.meaning_en: A plant or part of a plant eaten as food

words.meaning_en: Brothers and sisters in a family

words.meaning_en: The room where food is cooked

words.meaning_en: A long comfortable seat for more than one person

words.meaning_en: A pain felt inside the head

words.meaning_en: Unable to understand or think clearly

words.meaning_en: Not excited or upset; peaceful and relaxed
words.example_sentence: He stayed calm during the storm.

words.meaning_en: Talking casually about other people

words.meaning_en: A person you spend time with or travel with

words.meaning_en: Food and household items bought from a shop

words.meaning_en: Vehicles moving on roads

words.meaning_en: Bright with sunlight; not cloudy

words.meaning_en: The time in the morning when the sun appears

words.meaning_en: To take part in a game or fun activity

words.meaning_en: To gain knowledge or a new skill

words.meaning_en: To give lessons or explain something to someone

words.meaning_en: To make it easier for someone to do something

words.meaning_en: To hold something and take it from one place to another

words.meaning_en: To shut a door, window, or lid

words.meaning_en: To take hold of something moving through the air

words.meaning_en: To go up something using hands and feet

words.meaning_en: To move through water using your arms and legs

words.meaning_en: To make a picture using a pencil or pen

words.meaning_en: To make musical sounds with your voice

words.meaning_en: To move your body in rhythm to music

words.meaning_en: To make sounds showing you find something funny
